snippets.description:
CreateAlertPolicy creates a new alerting policy.

Design your application to single-thread API calls that modify the state of
alerting policies in a single project. This includes calls to
CreateAlertPolicy, DeleteAlertPolicy and UpdateAlertPolicy.
snippets.title: monitoring CreateAlertPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteAlertPolicy deletes an alerting policy.

Design your application to single-thread API calls that modify the state of
alerting policies in a single project. This includes calls to
CreateAlertPolicy, DeleteAlertPolicy and UpdateAlertPolicy.
snippets.title: monitoring DeleteAlertPolicy Sample

snippets.description: GetAlertPolicy gets a single alerting policy.
snippets.title: monitoring GetAlertPolicy Sample

snippets.description: ListAlertPolicies lists the existing alerting policies for the workspace.
snippets.title: monitoring ListAlertPolicies Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateAlertPolicy updates an alerting policy. You can either replace the entire policy with
a new one or replace only certain fields in the current alerting policy by
specifying the fields to be updated via `updateMask`. Returns the
updated alerting policy.

Design your application to single-thread API calls that modify the state of
alerting policies in a single project. This includes calls to
CreateAlertPolicy, DeleteAlertPolicy and UpdateAlertPolicy.
snippets.title: monitoring UpdateAlertPolicy Sample

snippets.description: CreateGroup creates a new group.
snippets.title: monitoring CreateGroup Sample

snippets.description: DeleteGroup deletes an existing group.
snippets.title: monitoring DeleteGroup Sample

snippets.description: GetGroup gets a single group.
snippets.title: monitoring GetGroup Sample

snippets.description: ListGroupMembers lists the monitored resources that are members of a group.
snippets.title: monitoring ListGroupMembers Sample

snippets.description: ListGroups lists the existing groups.
snippets.title: monitoring ListGroups Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateGroup updates an existing group.
You can change any group attributes except `name`.
snippets.title: monitoring UpdateGroup Sample

snippets.description:
CreateMetricDescriptor creates a new metric descriptor.
The creation is executed asynchronously.
User-created metric descriptors define
[custom metrics](https: //cloud.google.com/monitoring/custom-metrics).
The metric descriptor is updated if it already exists,
except that metric labels are never removed.
snippets.title: monitoring CreateMetricDescriptor Sample

snippets.description:
CreateServiceTimeSeries creates or adds data to one or more service time series. A service time
series is a time series for a metric from a Google Cloud service. The
response is empty if all time series in the request were written. If any
time series could not be written, a corresponding failure message is
included in the error response. This endpoint rejects writes to
user-defined metrics.
This method is only for use by Google Cloud services. Use
[projects.timeSeries.create][google.monitoring.v3.MetricService.CreateTimeSeries]
instead.
snippets.title: monitoring CreateServiceTimeSeries Sample

snippets.description:
CreateTimeSeries creates or adds data to one or more time series.
The response is empty if all time series in the request were written.
If any time series could not be written, a corresponding failure message is
included in the error response.
This method does not support
[resource locations constraint of an organization
policy](https: //cloud.google.com/resource-manager/docs/organization-policy/defining-locations#setting_the_organization_policy).
snippets.title: monitoring CreateTimeSeries Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteMetricDescriptor deletes a metric descriptor. Only user-created
[custom metrics](https: //cloud.google.com/monitoring/custom-metrics) can be
deleted.
snippets.title: monitoring DeleteMetricDescriptor Sample

snippets.description: GetMetricDescriptor gets a single metric descriptor.
snippets.title: monitoring GetMetricDescriptor Sample

snippets.description: GetMonitoredResourceDescriptor gets a single monitored resource descriptor.
snippets.title: monitoring GetMonitoredResourceDescriptor Sample

snippets.description: ListMetricDescriptors lists metric descriptors that match a filter.
snippets.title: monitoring ListMetricDescriptors Sample

snippets.description: ListMonitoredResourceDescriptors lists monitored resource descriptors that match a filter.
snippets.title: monitoring ListMonitoredResourceDescriptors Sample

snippets.description: ListTimeSeries lists time series that match a filter.
snippets.title: monitoring ListTimeSeries Sample

snippets.description:
CreateNotificationChannel creates a new notification channel, representing a single notification
endpoint such as an email address, SMS number, or PagerDuty service.

Design your application to single-thread API calls that modify the state of
notification channels in a single project. This includes calls to
CreateNotificationChannel, DeleteNotificationChannel and
UpdateNotificationChannel.
snippets.title: monitoring CreateNotificationChannel Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteNotificationChannel deletes a notification channel.

Design your application to single-thread API calls that modify the state of
notification channels in a single project. This includes calls to
CreateNotificationChannel, DeleteNotificationChannel and
UpdateNotificationChannel.
snippets.title: monitoring DeleteNotificationChannel Sample

snippets.description:
GetNotificationChannel gets a single notification channel. The channel includes the relevant
configuration details with which the channel was created. However, the
response may truncate or omit passwords, API keys, or other private key
matter and thus the response may not be 100% identical to the information
that was supplied in the call to the create method.
snippets.title: monitoring GetNotificationChannel Sample

snippets.description:
GetNotificationChannelDescriptor gets a single channel descriptor. The descriptor indicates which fields
are expected / permitted for a notification channel of the given type.
snippets.title: monitoring GetNotificationChannelDescriptor Sample

snippets.description:
GetNotificationChannelVerificationCode requests a verification code for an already verified channel that can then
be used in a call to VerifyNotificationChannel() on a different channel
with an equivalent identity in the same or in a different project. This
makes it possible to copy a channel between projects without requiring
manual reverification of the channel. If the channel is not in the
verified state, this method will fail (in other words, this may only be
used if the SendNotificationChannelVerificationCode and
VerifyNotificationChannel paths have already been used to put the given
channel into the verified state).

There is no guarantee that the verification codes returned by this method
will be of a similar structure or form as the ones that are delivered
to the channel via SendNotificationChannelVerificationCode; while
VerifyNotificationChannel() will recognize both the codes delivered via
SendNotificationChannelVerificationCode() and returned from
GetNotificationChannelVerificationCode(), it is typically the case that
the verification codes delivered via
SendNotificationChannelVerificationCode() will be shorter and also
have a shorter expiration (e.g. codes such as "G-123456") whereas
GetVerificationCode() will typically return a much longer, websafe base
64 encoded string that has a longer expiration time.
snippets.title: monitoring GetNotificationChannelVerificationCode Sample

snippets.description:
ListNotificationChannelDescriptors lists the descriptors for supported channel types. The use of descriptors
makes it possible for new channel types to be dynamically added.
snippets.title: monitoring ListNotificationChannelDescriptors Sample

snippets.description:
ListNotificationChannels lists the notification channels that have been created for the project.
To list the types of notification channels that are supported, use
the `ListNotificationChannelDescriptors` method.
snippets.title: monitoring ListNotificationChannels Sample

snippets.description:
SendNotificationChannelVerificationCode causes a verification code to be delivered to the channel. The code
can then be supplied in `VerifyNotificationChannel` to verify the channel.
snippets.title: monitoring SendNotificationChannelVerificationCode Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateNotificationChannel updates a notification channel. Fields not specified in the field mask
remain unchanged.

Design your application to single-thread API calls that modify the state of
notification channels in a single project. This includes calls to
CreateNotificationChannel, DeleteNotificationChannel and
UpdateNotificationChannel.
snippets.title: monitoring UpdateNotificationChannel Sample

snippets.description:
VerifyNotificationChannel verifies a `NotificationChannel` by proving receipt of the code
delivered to the channel as a result of calling
`SendNotificationChannelVerificationCode`.
snippets.title: monitoring VerifyNotificationChannel Sample

snippets.description:
QueryTimeSeries queries time series by using Monitoring Query Language (MQL). We recommend
using PromQL instead of MQL. For more information about the status of MQL,
see the [MQL deprecation
notice](https: //cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/deprecations/mql).


Deprecated: QueryTimeSeries may be removed in a future version.
snippets.title: monitoring QueryTimeSeries Sample

snippets.description: CreateService create a `Service`.
snippets.title: monitoring CreateService Sample

snippets.description: CreateServiceLevelObjective create a `ServiceLevelObjective` for the given `Service`.
snippets.title: monitoring CreateServiceLevelObjective Sample

snippets.description: DeleteService soft delete this `Service`.
snippets.title: monitoring DeleteService Sample

snippets.description: DeleteServiceLevelObjective delete the given `ServiceLevelObjective`.
snippets.title: monitoring DeleteServiceLevelObjective Sample

snippets.description: GetService get the named `Service`.
snippets.title: monitoring GetService Sample

snippets.description: GetServiceLevelObjective get a `ServiceLevelObjective` by name.
snippets.title: monitoring GetServiceLevelObjective Sample

snippets.description: ListServiceLevelObjectives list the `ServiceLevelObjective`s for the given `Service`.
snippets.title: monitoring ListServiceLevelObjectives Sample

snippets.description: ListServices list `Service`s for this Metrics Scope.
snippets.title: monitoring ListServices Sample

snippets.description: UpdateService update this `Service`.
snippets.title: monitoring UpdateService Sample

snippets.description: UpdateServiceLevelObjective update the given `ServiceLevelObjective`.
snippets.title: monitoring UpdateServiceLevelObjective Sample

snippets.description:
CreateSnooze creates a `Snooze` that will prevent alerts, which match the provided
criteria, from being opened. The `Snooze` applies for a specific time
interval.
snippets.title: monitoring CreateSnooze Sample

snippets.description: GetSnooze retrieves a `Snooze` by `name`.
snippets.title: monitoring GetSnooze Sample

snippets.description:
ListSnoozes lists the `Snooze`s associated with a project. Can optionally pass in
`filter`, which specifies predicates to match `Snooze`s.
snippets.title: monitoring ListSnoozes Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateSnooze updates a `Snooze`, identified by its `name`, with the parameters in the
given `Snooze` object.
snippets.title: monitoring UpdateSnooze Sample

snippets.description: CreateUptimeCheckConfig creates a new Uptime check configuration.
snippets.title: monitoring CreateUptimeCheckConfig Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteUptimeCheckConfig deletes an Uptime check configuration. Note that this method will fail
if the Uptime check configuration is referenced by an alert policy or
other dependent configs that would be rendered invalid by the deletion.
snippets.title: monitoring DeleteUptimeCheckConfig Sample

snippets.description: GetUptimeCheckConfig gets a single Uptime check configuration.
snippets.title: monitoring GetUptimeCheckConfig Sample

snippets.description:
ListUptimeCheckConfigs lists the existing valid Uptime check configurations for the project
(leaving out any invalid configurations).
snippets.title: monitoring ListUptimeCheckConfigs Sample

snippets.description: ListUptimeCheckIps returns the list of IP addresses that checkers run from.
snippets.title: monitoring ListUptimeCheckIps Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateUptimeCheckConfig updates an Uptime check configuration. You can either replace the entire
configuration with a new one or replace only certain fields in the current
configuration by specifying the fields to be updated via `updateMask`.
Returns the updated configuration.
snippets.title: monitoring UpdateUptimeCheckConfig Sample
